outdatedVersionWarning.displayName: This node is out of date. Please upgrade by removing it and adding a new one

source.description: Where to get the workflow to execute from

database.description: Load the workflow from the database by ID

localFile.description: Load the workflow from a locally saved file

parameter.description: Pass the JSON code of a workflow

url.description: Load the workflow from an URL

workflowId.description: Note on using an expression here: if this node is set to run once with all items, they will all be sent to the same workflow. That workflow's ID will be calculated by evaluating the expression for the first input item.

workflowPath.description: The path to local JSON workflow file to execute

workflowJson.description: The workflow JSON code to execute

workflowUrl.description: The URL from which to load the workflow from

executeWorkflowNotice.displayName: Any data you pass into this node will be output by the Execute Workflow Trigger. More info

once.description: Pass all items into a single execution of the sub-workflow

each.description: Call the sub-workflow individually for each item

waitForSubWorkflow.description: Whether the main workflow should wait for the sub-workflow to complete its execution before proceeding
